evidence: Auction strongly resonates with structural processes (ontological.structural), relational dynamics between buyers/sellers (ontological.relational), and the essential core of competitive selling (resonance.essential). Scores are low for existential/sacred aspects, as auctions are transactional rather than transcendent.
